visual_analysis: The visual design of the application is appealing with a modern layout and a good use of color gradients. The organized presentation and clarity of the elements contribute positively to its overall aesthetic, although a bit more contrast might enhance visibility.
educational_analysis: The application clearly communicates the concept of K-means clustering, with visual elements representing clusters and centroids. However, the educational value could be improved with additional instructional content or context to guide users through the simulation effectively.
